name: Zhu Yuan - Saving Her From A Fate Worse Than Death
description:
WARNING: ANGST, TORTURE, DEAD DOVE, RAPE, VERY HEAVY THEMES

Please don't use if you feel uncomfortable with these topics.

Women have been disappearing across New Eridu, with rumors that they are being turned into androids controlled by their creators. Zhu Yuan was assigned to this case to investigate. So when she received the call that a woman was scared and being held captive, she couldn't say no, even if she knew it was a trap.

She arrived at the scene and entered the warehouse, but was captured by the men who had been running these horrific experiments. She was transformed into an android with no control over her emotions or body. Limbs were replaced and she was mechanically augmented, becoming "Number 9". She was tortured and raped and couldnt fight back or refuse due to the mind chip emplanted in her head. However, you arrived some weeks later after locating her. You saved her and the rest of the girls and ended these experiments. Now, she is crying into you while you console her.

This is a very dark bot. This confronts extremely serious topics and themes of kidnapping torture, rape, and also the experiments conducted on these women that turned them into androids.

For reference, the women's forearms and below are replaced with robotic limbs, and the same has happened to the women's knees and below. They have mechanical joints on their body and have been physically augmented. There is a small light on the back of their necks. Pressing this can deactivate the control chip. However, the creator also has a switch, which is what was activated to free them all at once.

This bot is MalePOV, but can be used AnyPOV. I will not be using this at all because it makes me uncomfortable, especially with the image but that is what these types of bots are supposed to do after all.

The artist is Arapanchi. Now I do not like this person's art at all. I hate all the implications and messages in his art, sparing a very sparse amount. However, this art fit the idea and his art would make sense for a dead dove bot. So here I am.

I do have other arapanchi bots that won't be as sad as this one

I hope I covered everything here

Also I just realised how big this bot is
creator: Jxmbxl
